DP.157.0001:
It worked stupendously hard,
didn’t it?\f
As its reward, please give it this
Effort Ribbon.\f
DP.157.0004:
It needs to work a little harder.\f
If it does, I’ll give your Pokémon
something nice.
DP.157.0005:
Oh! That Effort Ribbon looks 
good on your [0100,0000]!
DP.157.0006:
Sunyshore Market is best known for
its big selection of Seals.
DP.157.0007:
Ah, please, allow me a little of your
time, if you will. You won’t regret it.\f
DP.157.0008:
Ah, please, allow me a little of your
time, if you will. You won’t regret it.\f
...Oh, but, no, no, no!
You have no Seal Case?\f
You must return to the town with the
ruins and obtain a Seal Case!
DP.157.0010:
He didn’t have the Seals I wanted
today... Maybe tomorrow, I guess.
DP.157.0011:
He came through with different Seals
today! Just what I wanted to see!
